description: Prompt Perfect provides tools that improve and refine prompts for AI workflows, including a browser extension, a ChatGPT-based assistant, and image-focused tooling. Its website presents these products as ways to get clearer prompts and better AI outputs.
summary: Prompt Perfect exposes a public HTTP API documented by an OpenAPI spec at `https://promptperfect.xyz/openapi.json`, plus a cataloged MCP server at `https://chatgpt.promptperfect.xyz/mcp` whose authentication appears required but is not publicly documented on the site.
